layers.name: stone_a_rounded
layers.description: Single rounded oval painted granite stone on transparent background. Cracked surface with fine hairline cracks, painterly hand-painted, cool gray palette, soft alpha edges. SINGLE STONE — not a group, not a scene. Designed as a stamp piece for tiling.
layers.negative_description: multiple stones, scene, full image, grid, square edges, hard cutoff, walls, character

layers.name: stone_b_irregular
layers.description: Single irregular weathered granite stone on transparent background. Asymmetric shape with chipped corner, faint moss in one crack, painterly hand-painted, cool gray, soft alpha edges. SINGLE STONE designed as a stamp piece.
layers.negative_description: multiple stones, scene, full image, grid, square edges, hard cutoff, walls, character

layers.name: stone_c_small_chip
layers.description: Single small painted stone fragment on transparent background, chipped angular edges, smaller compact size, painterly hand-painted, cool gray palette, soft alpha edges. SINGLE small stamp piece.
layers.negative_description: multiple stones, scene, full image, grid, square edges, hard cutoff, walls, character, large

layers.name: stone_d_flat_broad
layers.description: Single large flat granite stone on transparent background, broad shallow oval with hairline cracks, painterly hand-painted, cool gray, soft alpha edges. Larger stamp piece variant.
layers.negative_description: multiple stones, scene, full image, grid, square edges, hard cutoff, walls, character

layers.name: stone_e_mossy
layers.description: Single granite stone with vibrant green moss patches on transparent background, partially moss-covered, painterly hand-painted, cool gray with muted green moss, soft alpha edges. Mossy stamp variant.
layers.negative_description: multiple stones, scene, full image, grid, square edges, hard cutoff, walls, character, fully green
